T H E N A R R O W
YO U R N I C H E T O O L
T h e K n o w l e d g e

The “Narrow Your Niche Tool” is your sentence, your mission statement and your focus. In life, when you have
clarity on where you want to go, things get less confusing. This one sentence is designed to narrow your niche and
give you 100% clarity on what you offer, who you want to help and how exactly you’re going to help them!
I’m launching a group/workshop/mastermind to help _____________________________________________________________
to _____________________________________________________ by ________________________________________________________
Name: 	_________________________________________________________ 	Date: 	________________________________________________________
n a r r o w i n g y o u r n i c h e
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
